content:
Hi there! I am having a strange issue with runic pre-commit, where the CI passes before merging a pull request, but fails right after. Any idea what I might be doing wrong?

  • Before: https://github.com/Klafyvel/Strophe.jl/actions/runs/22547493728/job/65312154564
  • After: https://github.com/Klafyvel/Strophe.jl/actions/runs/22550941660/job/65320683875
